text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I had thought the road to glory<n>blocked and
impassable...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But that is when I saw my prayers<n>answered one
by one, clearing the<n>blockage away!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to my fans who never gave<n>up on me,
we've come to the last big<n>event of the spring
season—the<n>Takarazuka Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
And I won't let it all be for naught,<n>Trainer! I'll run
the best race of my<n>life!
choice_data_list: How are you feeling? You ready?
How are you feeling? You ready?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I am. I used to compete by scraping<n>by on my
good luck. I chose to only<n>follow my predictions...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But now I've got the hopes of all my<n>fans to count
on! I feel stronger than<n>ever!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
My wish to win, and my fans' wish<n>to see me
win...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Add a little dollop of luck on top of<n>that, and there
isn't a single thing to<n>be scared of.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Fate will not win this race for<n>me—victory will be
claimed by me, and<n>me alone!
choice_data_list: ...Maybe you should reel it in just a little?

text_block_list.text: Y-yeah, I was honestly thinking the<n>same...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But my passion is real! I'm going to<n>rebuild myself
and deliver a result<n>worth celebrating.
